dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Hold on, folks, we're experiencing some air pockets."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, brow furrowed in concentration.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Just the usual turbulence, Sam. Nothing to worry about."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, eyes wide with fear.

dialogue.speaker: ALI VO
dialogue.line: "This is your captain speaking. We'll do our best to get you to your destination safely."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, trying to reassure SAM with a calm demeanor.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Don't worry, folks, we'll be fine. The pilots will get us through this."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of the plane's interior, with ALI's voice booming from the speakers.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Leo, Sam, I need you to keep an eye on the controls. If anything goes wrong, I need you to react quickly."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his eyes locking onto LEO and SAM.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "What makes you think we can handle this, Captain? We're not exactly trained pilots."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, trying to hide his fear.

dialogue.speaker: LEO LOOKS SKEPTICAL
dialogue.line: Katrina walks into the cockpit, a concerned expression on her face.
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, his arms crossed and a hint of defiance on his face.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Captain, I'm not sure if this is a good idea. We're going to get you help on the ground."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KATRINA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We can't wait, Katrina. We have to get these passengers to their destination."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of KATRINA, her brow furrowed in worry.

dialogue.speaker: ALI SHAKES HIS HEAD
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his jaw set in determination.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Hold on, this is going to be rough."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his knuckles white on the wheel.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Don't worry, Sam, we'll get through this. Ali knows what he's doing."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his eyes wide with fear.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, trying to sound calm.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We'll get out of this, Katrina. Just hang on."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of KATRINA, her voice panicked.
